tsFilePolicies.reason: Language-service implementation files must not exist in the active standalone compiler source tree.
Language-service protocol/server files must not exist in the active standalone compiler source tree.
Fourslash/editor harness files must not exist in the active standalone compiler source tree.

Generated AST infrastructure emitted by porter:ast from packages/tsts/schema/tsgo/*; carries @tsgo-generated metadata, not @tsgo-unit.
The Go compatibility layer is authored TypeScript infrastructure, not a TS-Go source unit.
The Go compatibility layer is authored TypeScript infrastructure, not a TS-Go source unit.
Every source file must carry at least one @tsgo-unit unless an explicit policy allows it.

overrides.reason: Fixed-width integer and floating-point behavior must be implemented as an explicit Go-semantics layer.
Operating-system bindings must be implemented through the TypeScript host layer.
File-watch bindings must be implemented through the TypeScript host layer.

policies.reason: Go test units are ported through the test-parity harness, not production compiler scaffolds.
Generated Go files must be regenerated from their upstream source schema or generator.
Fixed-width integer and floating-point behavior must be hand-ported with explicit JavaScript/Tsonic numeric semantics.
OS filesystem bindings must map to the TypeScript/Node host layer, not a literal syscall port.
File watching must map to the TypeScript/Node host layer.

Language-service implementation is not in the standalone compiler porter scope.
